hypothesis: exp_061/062 confirm deployment-time fixes are insufficient (2 gates in 70 runs). The policy mean hasn't learned navigation. Three changes from exp_060: 1. Remove max_logstd clamp — let std be learnable without artificial constraint. With clamp=-1.0, std is forced to ~0.37 from the start, which may prevent exploration needed for the mean to find the navigation mode. 2. Higher ent_coef=0.03 — encourage exploration early in training. 3. Longer budget (7200s) — Swift trains 100M steps; we get ~1.5M in 3600s. Doubling budget should reach ~3M steps. The mean needs more time to converge. Paper basis: Entropy Annealing (2405.20250) — start high, let it decay naturally via learnable logstd. Dynamic Entropy Tuning (2512.18336) — stochastic policies generalize where deterministic crash.
